name: 14q32_33_EIF5_subtelomeric_SD
description: Distal 14q32.33 subtelomeric SD cluster covering EIF5, MARK3, BRF1, BTBD6, and the telomere-adjacent shore (~2 Mb). Carries SDs shared with other subtelomeres (2q, 12q, 22q) at 90-97% identity and mediates rare 14q-subtelomeric deletions. Some modules overlap distal IGH constant-region flank.

architecture.internal_structure: Telomere-proximal SD modules of 5-50 kb at 90-97% identity shared with 2q, 12q, 22q subtelomeres; EIF5/MARK3 unique cores embedded.
